title: Tulangan Utara Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tulangan Utara with a Z-Score of +3.54. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Tulangan Utara is causing extremely hot temperatures, with a CDD of 11.4 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 74%, and wind speed is 5.9 km/h, making the conditions even more unbearable. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Operational measures should be taken immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
